use_cases: Service portfolio showcases for agencies and freelancers
Team member or service provider introductions
ai_summary: A vertically-oriented tab interface featuring smooth directional slide transitions and auto-play functionality. Displays service cards with images, titles, and descriptions in a carousel-like manner. Includes navigation arrows, interactive tab selection, and animated content morphing between states. Best suited for portfolio sites, SaaS landing pages, or creative agency showcases requiring elegant service presentations.
